title: Animal Crossing: New Leaf Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Animal Crossing: New Leaf (2012) is a acclaimed life sim title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Manage daily activities, build relationships, and customize your town or avatar.
